nasb.text: Drinks were served in golden vessels of various kinds, and the royal wine was plentiful according to the king’s bounty.

esv.text: Drinks were served in golden vessels, vessels of different kinds, and the royal wine was lavished according to the bounty of the king.

cnv.text: 賜飲都用金器皿；器皿與器皿各有不同；御酒很多，足顯王的厚賜。

ccb.text: 饮酒用的是各式各样的金器皿，御酒大量供应，足显王的慷慨。
